prompt: Explain why transformer attention is useful for resolving ambiguous pronouns. Use one concise paragraph and include one limitation.

A service has 18,400 users in January. Users grow 7% monthly for 5 months, then churn removes 11% of the user base, then growth resumes at 4% monthly for 3 months. What is the final user count, rounded to the nearest whole user? Show the calculation.
Classify the sentiment as positive, negative, or mixed, and justify in two sentences: The patch finally fixed the crash, but it made the dashboard load so slowly that my team stopped using it.
Summarise this in exactly 25 words: Edge inference can lower latency and cost, but models deployed locally need careful routing, monitoring, and fallback paths when prompts exceed local capability.
Extract named entities as JSON with keys person, organization, location, and date: On 12 March 2026, Priya Menon met AMD engineers at the London AI Lab before briefing the Open Compute Project.

Find the bug and provide a corrected Python implementation:

def rolling_average(values, window):
    result = []
    for i in range(len(values)):
        start = i - window
        chunk = values[start:i]
        result.append(sum(chunk) / window)
    return result

The intended output has one average per complete window only.
Four services A, B, C, and D deploy in four time slots. A must deploy before C. B cannot deploy first or last. D deploys immediately after B. C is not fourth. List every valid deployment order.

Write a Python function topological_layers(edges) that returns batches of nodes that can run in parallel. Input is an iterable of (before, after) pairs. Include isolated prerequisites, detect cycles with ValueError, and keep each layer sorted.
Build a complete HTML page that compares two images with a draggable before/after slider, accessible labels, responsive layout, and no external JavaScript dependencies.

Write a Python program that generates a QGroundControl mission JSON file for a drone to fly a 4 metre square at 2 metre altitude around central Seattle, including takeoff, waypoints, and return-to-launch.
Summarize ISO 22081 in plain English, including scope, main requirements, and how it changes drawing interpretation for general geometrical tolerances.
I load a very large ECW raster into a QGIS QgsMapCanvas. Each zoom in and out increases RAM usage until the app becomes unstable. Diagnose likely causes and show a corrected PyQGIS approach.
Classify this message as Spam or Ham and return strict JSON with label and reason: Click here to win a lottery prize if you verify your bank account today.
Write an OCaml program that calls a SOAP service, builds the XML envelope, sends the HTTP request, handles errors, and parses the response.
